items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only - If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Conference with Legal Counsel – Anticipated Litigation Significant exposure to litigation pursuant to paragraph (4) of subdivision (d) of Section 54956.9: One Case.
Reconvene to Regular Session at Approximately 7:00pm
Report Out on Closed Session from 9.23.20
Welcome by the School Board President

Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Public Hearing on Learning Continuity and Attendance for 2020-21
Public Hearing Pursuant to Public Contract Code Section 4110 Regarding Sausal Corporation’s Use of Unlisted Subcontractor
Approval of Measure T Bond Program $20K and Under Items Tracking List
Approval of Kennedy Middle School Modernization Project Cal-Pacific Construction Change Order #4
Approval of Roosevelt Elementary School Modernization Project CalState Construction Change Order #1
Approval of $240,000 Movements from Site Projects to Program Administration Project for Covid-19 Safety Compliance Officers (SCO)
Approval of Touchless Plumbing Fixture Replacement Proposals for Orion Alternative School (Formerly John Gill School) and Roy Cloud School with CAW
Approval of Touchless Plumbing Fixture Replacement Proposals for Various Sites with Kitchell

Consideration of 1) Canceling Contract with Sausal Corporation for the Orion Alternative School (Formerly John Gill Elementary School) Modernization and New Building Project, or 2) Assessing a Penalty against Sausal Corporation No More than 10% of Sausal Corporation’s Subcontract with National Glass
Recognition of Staff Who Have Reached a Longevity Milestone with the Redwood City School District
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Citizen Schools for the Fiscal Year 2020-21
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and the YMCA of Silicon Valley for the Fiscal Year 2020-21
Approval of Additional Vendors to be Included with Non-Public School ("NPS")/Non-Public Agency ("NPA") Master Contract
Discussion and Approval of Board Policy 6157 - Distance Teaching and Learning
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - August, 2020
Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Agenda Schedule

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced during Item 6.1 (Changes to the Agenda): (1) Item 12.1 (Recognition of Staff Who Have Reached Longevity Milestones) moved earlier on the agenda, before public hearings, per Dr. Baker's recommendation; (2) Items 16.1, 16.2, and 16.3 moved to consent agenda; (3) Item 16.4 kept as discussion item per Dennis's request
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can we have a roll call vote, please? Trustee McBride. Aye. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Trustee Diaz-Silco. Aye. Vice President MacAvoy. Aye. President Lawson. Aye.
